news.headline: GERMAN FINANCE MINISTER KLINGBEIL: THE TOP PRIORITY FOR US IS TO GET GERMANY BACK ON A GROWTH PATH

news.summary: CoStar Group, a prominent player in commercial real estate data and technology listed on NASDAQ as CSGP, has appointed Alexa-Maria Rathbone Barker as the Head of CoStar Europe. This move is significant in the company's expansion strategy in Europe. In her new capacity, Alexa will supervise CoStar's activities in the UK, solidifying the company's reputation as a reliable real estate information provider. This development emphasizes CoStar's commitment to growth and leadership in the European market.
news.headline: Alexa-Maria Rathbone Barker appointed Head of CoStar Europe, overseeing UK operations in company's strategic growth plan.

news.summary: Scheduled from January 21 to 25 at IFEMA Madrid, the International Tourism Trade Fair is enhancing its position as a leader in the industry, particularly with Hall 12 as the focal point for tourism innovation. During the professional days of the fair, the Knowledge Hub will feature the Travel Technology area, which has experienced significant growth.
news.headline: FITUR 2026 introduces Knowledge Hub at IFEMA MADRID, solidifying innovation in Hall 12. Travel Technology area expanded.

news.summary: On Thursday, July 31, 2025, KBR is scheduled to hold a conference call to review its financial performance for the second quarter. This call serves as an opportunity for stakeholders to gain insights into the company's financial results and projections. The call is anticipated to cover key figures such as revenue, expenses, and overall profitability during the specified quarter. Investors, analysts, and other interested parties are encouraged to participate in the conference call to stay updated on KBR's financial standing and strategic direction.
news.headline: KBR, Inc. will host a conference call on July 31, 2025, to discuss second quarter financial results.

news.summary: Esaote, a prominent player in medical diagnostic imaging, has unveiled its latest product, the Vet-MR Grande ELITE, at the ECVS 2025 event in Genoa, Italy and Antwerp, Belgium. This cutting-edge veterinary MRI represents the next evolution in the field. The ECVS event, the Annual scientific meeting of the European College, serves as the platform for this groundbreaking launch.
news.headline: Esaote showcases Vet -MR Grande ELITE, the next-gen veterinary MRI at ECVS 2025. Leading medical imaging company.

news.summary: Jiayin Group Inc., a fintech platform in China, announced the record date and payment date for cash dividends. The board of directors approved cash dividends of US$0.20 per ordinary share or US$0.80 per American depositary share (“ADS”). Shareholders on record as of July 14, 2025, will receive dividends around July 18, 2025. ADS holders, including JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A., will receive dividends on or about July 24, 2025, subject to the terms of the deposit agreement.
news.headline: Jiayin Group Inc. will pay cash dividends of US$0.20 per share, or US$0.80 per ADS, to holders shown on record date July 14, 2025, with payments expected around July 18 and July 24, 2025.

news.summary: In Victoria, Seychelles on July 3, 2025, KuCoin, a prominent worldwide cryptocurrency exchange, has disclosed that KuCoin Futures has been officially added to CoinGlass, a respected platform for cryptocurrency derivatives analytics. This move has propelled KuCoin Futures to the 4th position globally among all such platforms, marking a significant achievement for the company.
news.headline: KuCoin Futures ranks 4th globally on CoinGlass' derivatives exchange list, showcasing its industry ranking.

news.summary: OMS CEO, How Meng Hock, is scheduled to participate in a leadership panel on July 8 at 10:20 a.m.
news.headline: OMS Energy Technologies Inc. CEO How Meng Hock to share strategic insights at ORY APAC-US Conference on July 8 at 10:20 a.m.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, GRAVITY Co., Ltd. (NasdaqGM: GRVY), a prominent developer and publisher of online and mobile games based in Seoul, South Korea, disclosed the launch of Ragnarok: Twilight (Chinese Title: RO 仙境傳說：曙光) by its wholly-owned subsidiary, GRAVITY Game Vision, Ltd. This MMORPG mobile game was officially released in Taiwan, Hong Kong, and Macau on the same day. This move signifies Gravity's expansion into these markets and aims to capture the growing mobile gaming sector in the region.
news.headline: Gravity Co., Ltd. launches Ragnarok: Twilight in Taiwan, Hong Kong, and Macau on July 3, 2025.(Gravity-NasdaqGM: GRVY)

news.summary: Gravity Co., Ltd. unveiled the launch of Ragnarok Zero, an MMORPG PC game, in Taiwan, Hong Kong, and Macau on July 3, 2025. The game was released by GRAVITY Communications Co., Ltd., a wholly-owned subsidiary of Gravity. Known for developing and publishing online and mobile games, Gravity is listed on NasdaqGM under the ticker symbol GRVY. The title of the game in Chinese is RO 仙境傳說 Online ：樂園. This strategic move marks Gravity's expansion into these markets, targeting a significant player base in East Asia.
news.headline: Ragnarok Zero launched in Taiwan, HK, Macau on July 3, 2025 by Gravity Co. Ltd, subsidiary of GRAVITY Communications Co., Ltd.

news.summary: In 2024, the number of transactions involving USDC on BitPay was nearly double that of USDT transactions. However, this year, the trend has changed, with Tether transactions gaining more traction on the platform.
news.headline: USDT competes with USDC on BitPay payments in 2025, after USDC surpassed USDT in transactions in 2024. Trend now favors Tether.

news.summary: On June 29, 2025, the annual Running at the Castle of Versailles occurred in Versailles, France. This renowned event, known for its historic importance and regal nature, featured a unique collaboration between XTEP, a Chinese sports brand, and Unitree Technology, a robot technology company. The race, held in the picturesque setting of Versailles, introduced a futuristic element by incorporating a humanoid robot into the event. This innovative partnership added an exciting twist to the traditional race, attracting significant attention and setting a precedent for future events.
news.headline: Chinese brands Xtep and Unitree Technology collaborate at historic race in Versailles, showcasing new running tech.

news.summary: In Oslo, Norway, Aker ASA is set to release its financial performance for the second quarter and first half of 2025 on July 16, 2025, at 07:00 CEST. Following this, an online presentation of the results will be accessible via webcast on the same day beginning at 09:00 CEST. The webcast will provide a detailed overview of the company's financial standings, with interested parties invited to attend. Save the date to stay informed!
news.headline: Aker ASA to report Q2 and half-year results for 2025 on July 16, 2025, at 07:00 CEST with a webcast at 09:00 CEST.

news.summary: With more than 20 years of expertise in driving marketing evolution to enhance growth and brand influence, a professional based in Santa Clara, California and Pune, India is making a significant impact. On July 3, 2025, Persistent Systems (BSE: 533179) (NSE: PERSISTENT), renowned for its Digital Engineering and Enterprise services, welcomes this individual to their team.
news.headline: Shimona Chadha appointed as Chief Marketing Officer at Persistent Systems, bringing 20+ years of marketing experience.

news.summary: Alternative cryptocurrency Memecoins are exhibiting significant gains early on Thursday, outperforming Bitcoin, which almost reached $110,000. Notably, Solana-based Bonk surged over 21%, emerging as the most profitable cryptocurrency within the past 24 hours. The trading volume for this dog-themed coin skyrocketed by 336%, approaching nearly $560 million in the same period, indicating substantial buying activity. Additionally, open interest surged by 40% in the past day, as per data from Coinglass. Renowned cryptocurrency trader Bluntz predicted that Bonk could potentially surge by "at least" 100%-130%, although a precise timeline was not provided. For more details, the entire article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Dog-themed memecoins lead gains with Solana-based Bonk rallying over 21%, trading volume up 336% to $560 million in 24 hours.

Liverpool's Diogo Jota reportedly killed in car crash Liverpool footballer Diogo Jota has been killed in a car crash in Spain, local media reports. The news is yet to be confirmed by his club. Jota was aged 28 and married Rute Cardoso two weeks ago. They had 3 children.
Liverpool FC: Liverpool Football Club are devastated by the tragic passing of Diogo Jota.

news.summary: In the year 2024, USDC transactions on BitPay surpassed those of USDT by nearly double, however, this year the trend has reversed with Tether transactions now taking the lead.
news.headline: In 2025, Tether USDT edges closer to Circle's USDC on BitPay after USDC transactions fall from double to in favor.

news.summary: In Singapore on July 3, 2025, a highly influential whitepaper named "The Future of Global Payments & Fourth Generation Payment Networks (4GPN)" was unveiled, marking the beginning of a transformative period in fintech. This innovative report, a collaboration between Thunderbird School of Global Management and, explores cutting-edge concepts in the industry.
news.headline: New whitepaper on the future of payments by Thunderbird School explores Fourth Generation Payment Networks (4GPN), setting new industry standards.

news.summary: In Dubai, United Arab Emirates, on July 3, 2025, Bybit, the world's second-highest cryptocurrency exchange based on trading volume, announces the recognition of Robert MacDonald, Chief Legal and Compliance Officer at Bybit. He has been highlighted in the renowned trade publication Asian Legal Business (ALB) for his notable contributions.
news.headline: Bybit's Robert MacDonald named to ALB's Top 15 in 2025. Bybit - 2nd biggest crypto exchange by volume.

news.summary: South Korea has experienced a significant surge in anticipation of reforms that are favorable to shareholders under a new president. This has led to South Korea becoming the top-performing market in Asia and surpassing other markets globally.
news.headline: South Korea's stock market surges 30% due to optimism over pro-shareholder reforms by the new president. Best in Asia.
Russian army 'liberates' Razino settlement in DPR, Defense Ministry reports

news.summary: Today, Sectra, a Swedish medical imaging IT and cybersecurity company listed on the Stockholm Stock Exchange under SECT B, released its Annual Report and Sustainability Report for the fiscal year 2024/2025. The reports encompass the Corporate Governance Report for the corresponding period.
news.headline: Sectra releases Annual & Sustainability Reports for 2024/2025 fiscal year in Linköping, Sweden. Contains Corporate Governance Report.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, in Jakarta, Indonesia, Vantage Foundation announced a collaboration with KDM Foundation, a local nonprofit focused on improving the lives of underprivileged children. The partnership aims to support homeless children by providing educational and creative resources. Vantage Foundation's commitment to social responsibility is evident through this initiative, highlighting their dedication to making a positive difference in the community. The collaboration is set to benefit a significant number of homeless children in Jakarta and surrounding areas by enhancing their access to education and fostering creative development.
news.headline: Vantage Foundation partners with KDM Foundation in Jakarta to empower street children through education and creativity.

news.summary: In an announcement made on July 3, 2025, it was revealed that the American Council of Learned Societies (ACLS) is teaming up with The Robert H. N. Ho Family Foundation Global and Yale University Press on a significant project. The collaboration will result in the creation of a new book series called Global Buddhism. This initiative is expected to bring attention to various perspectives on Buddhism on a large scale, with a focus on global outreach and scholarly contributions.
news.headline: ACLS partnering with The Robert H. N. Ho Family Foundation Global & Yale University Press to publish Global Buddhism book series.

news.summary: On June 27 in Linyi City, located in Shandong Province, east China, the 4th RCEP (Shandong) Import Expo commenced. The event showcased 348 participating enterprises through 1,200 booths within an exhibition area spanning 35,000 square meters. Over the course of the expo, it drew the attention of 15,000 visitors, making it a significant platform for business interactions and trade opportunities in the region.
news.headline: 4th RCEP (Shandong) Import Expo in Linyi City, China featured 348 enterprises, 35,000sqm area, 1,200 booths, 15,000 visitors in 2025.
